response.global_analysis: 1. Song Recognition: Identified the song as 'Sekai wo Kaesasete Okureyo' by Sambomaster, performed by hololive ReGLOSS. 2. Timing Alignment: Captured the visual member-introduction cards during the intro, synchronized all lyrics sections, and timed the energetic post-performance MC speeches accurately. 3. Translation Quality: Ensured poetic nuance in song lyrics and matched the bright, lively tone of the idols' MC banter.

subtitles.original: 音乃瀬奏
subtitles.english: [Otonose Kanade]

subtitles.original: 一条莉々華
subtitles.english: [Ichijou Ririka]

subtitles.original: 儒烏風亭らでん
subtitles.english: [Juufuutei Raden]

subtitles.original: 轟はじめ
subtitles.english: [Todoroki Hajime]

subtitles.original: 轟はじめ / 音乃瀬奏 / 一条莉々華 / 儒烏風亭らでん
subtitles.english: [Todoroki Hajime / Otonose Kanade / Ichijou Ririka / Juufuutei Raden]

subtitles.original: 神様 この花びらを ある人は美しいと呟いた
subtitles.english: God, someone whispered that this flower petal was beautiful.

subtitles.original: この地球の横顔は 遠くで見ている君の世界では
subtitles.english: In your world, watching from afar, the profile of this Earth...

subtitles.original: 現実を逆さまにして 無くしそうなものだけ 振り落とした
subtitles.english: Turning reality upside down, I shook off only what I seemed about to lose.

subtitles.original: 手のひらで拾い上げようとしたら 指の隙間すり抜けて消えてった
subtitles.english: When I tried to scoop it up in my palm, it slipped through my fingers and vanished.

subtitles.original: 形あるものだけが すべてじゃないけど
subtitles.english: Tangible things aren't everything, but...

subtitles.original: 価値あるものが葛藤を知っても 走るよ
subtitles.english: Even if valuable things learn of conflict, I will run!

subtitles.original: この世界を変えることは きっとできないけど
subtitles.english: Surely, I cannot change this world, but...

subtitles.original: 君の中の世界なら 変えられるはず
subtitles.english: I should be able to change the world inside of you!

subtitles.original: うつむいて咲いて実のって 晴れて
subtitles.english: Bowing down, blooming, bearing fruit, clearing up...

subtitles.original: なにひとつ隠せないから
subtitles.english: Because I can't hide a single thing.

subtitles.original: 最後に君が笑ってくれれば
subtitles.english: If you would just smile for me at the very end...

subtitles.original: もうそれだけでいい
subtitles.english: ...that would be more than enough.

subtitles.original: 言葉を紡ぐ人 優しさを編む人
subtitles.english: Those who spin words, those who weave kindness...

subtitles.original: それぞれの正義を 分かってあげたい
subtitles.english: I want to understand each of their versions of justice.

subtitles.original: 絡まった矛盾と辻褄合わせ
subtitles.english: Entangled contradictions and rationalizations...

subtitles.original: そんな切なさを抱え 今日を生きて
subtitles.english: Carrying such sadness, we live today.

subtitles.original: 分け合った灯り 隣から隣
subtitles.english: The light we shared, from neighbor to neighbor...

subtitles.original: やがてひとつに 夜の帳へ
subtitles.english: ...eventually becomes one, into the veil of night.

subtitles.original: 息を吹き込んだ
subtitles.english: We breathed life into it.

subtitles.original: 君とじゃなきゃ ダメなんだ
subtitles.english: It has to be with you, or it's no good.

subtitles.original: このまま寝てしまうには
subtitles.english: To just fall asleep like this...

subtitles.original: もったいないほど
subtitles.english: ...would be such a waste.

subtitles.original: 優しさにくるまった
subtitles.english: Enwrapped in kindness,

subtitles.original: 夜だった
subtitles.english: ...was the night.

subtitles.original: はっきり浮かび上がった 夢の輪郭
subtitles.english: The clearly emerging outline of a dream...

subtitles.original: それは確かに愛だった
subtitles.english: ...was surely love.

subtitles.original: 月が見守る航路 一瞬を立ち止めて
subtitles.english: The route watched over by the moon, stopping for a moment...

subtitles.original: きらめく星
subtitles.english: ...sparkling stars.

subtitles.original: 色や形 温度や響き
subtitles.english: Colors, shapes, temperatures, and resonances...

subtitles.original: それらすべて持ち寄ろう 僕らだけど
subtitles.english: Let's bring them all together, though we are who we are.

subtitles.original: きっと最後にあの音で繋がって
subtitles.english: Surely, we will connect in the end with that sound.

subtitles.original: この世界を変えることは きっとできないけど
subtitles.english: Surely, I cannot change this world, but...

subtitles.original: 君の中の世界なら 変えられるはず
subtitles.english: I should be able to change the world inside of you!

subtitles.original: うつむいて咲いて実のって 晴れて
subtitles.english: Bowing down, blooming, bearing fruit, clearing up...

subtitles.original: なにひとつ隠せないから
subtitles.english: Because I can't hide a single thing.

subtitles.original: 最後に君が笑ってくれれば
subtitles.english: If you would just smile for me at the very end...
